# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def upload
    @image = Image.new(image_params)
    if @image.save
      process_image(@image)
      redirect_to @image
    else
      render :new
    end
  end

  private

  def image_params
    params.require(:image).permit(:file, :format, :size)
  end

  def process_image(image)
    input_file = image.file.path
    output_format = params[:format] || 'jpg'
    output_size = params[:size] || '800x600'
    
    output_file = "#{input_file.split('.')[0]}.#{output_format}"
    
    command = "convert #{input_file} -resize #{output_size} #{output_file}"
    system(command)
    
    image.update(processed_file: output_file)
  end
end
